papers.title: OneReason Technical Report
papers.summary: Extends the OneRec family toward reasoning-style generative recommendation. It argues that recommendation reasoning needs itemic-token perception and cognition over user behavior sequences, then introduces OneReason with perception-focused pre-training, three-level cognition-enhanced CoT SFT and specialize-then-unify RL.
papers.reason: 快手 OneRec 系列最新推荐推理方向：2026-06-04 新稿，把生成式推荐从 scaling 推到 reasoning，重点看 item token 语义感知、用户兴趣认知、CoT 格式和 RL 训练配方。

papers.title: KVEraser: Learning to Steer KV Cache for Efficient Localized Context Erasing
papers.summary: Post-hoc context erasing over the KV cache is challenging because a local edit has a global consequence: once a span has been processed, its influence propagates into the cached states of all subsequent tokens. This issue arises naturally in long-context LLM applications, where stale retrieved facts, incorrect tool observations, retracted user preferences, or harmful prompt injections may be identified only after prefill. Exact erasing must then recompute all tokens after the deleted span, making its computational cost depend on suffix length rather than erased-span length. We introduce KVEraser, a learned KV-cache editing method for efficient localized context erasing. Given a processed context and a span to remove, KVEraser replaces only the KV states of the erased interval with learned steering states while reusing the remaining cache unchanged. To learn a transferable erasing mechanism, we build a two-stage training pipeline: generic span-neighbor pre-training teaches the eraser to suppress the influence of the erased span, while task-specific fine-tuning adapts this capability to downstream scenarios. Experiments show that KVEraser nearly matches full recomputation in post-erasure performance on in-domain tasks across 1K--32K context lengths, while its latency increases by only 24% compared with a 17.6x increase for full recomputation. KVEraser also generalizes to unseen long-document QA tasks with harmful factual distractors, achieving the best performance among approximate baselines with a 3--4x speedup over full recomputation.
papers.reason: 近 30 天；关键词：cs.CL, efficient, kv-cache。Post-hoc context erasing over the KV cache is challenging because a local edit has a global consequence: once a span has been proc...

papers.title: CacheWise: Understanding Workloads and Optimizing KVCache Management for Efficiently Serving LLM Coding Agents
papers.summary: Coding agents are a fast-growing LLM application, executing as long-running closed-loop sessions in which LLM generations alternate with external tool calls. Yet, unlike chat workloads, their serving behavior has not been studied extensively. We address this gap by collecting a dataset of real-world coding assistant traces. Our analysis shows that coding agent sessions repeatedly reuse large prefixes and create sustained KVCache pressure that conventional LLM serving policies handle poorly. Based on our analysis, we present CacheWise, a KVCache management layer that improves KVCache reuse for coding agent workloads. CacheWise combines prefix-aware scheduling with reuse-aware eviction guided by lightweight predictions from tool call metadata. Implemented in vLLM and evaluated on the collected traces, CacheWise reduces KVCache evictions by up to 2-2.6x and improves total agent session completion time by up to 3.5x.
papers.reason: 近 30 天；关键词：cs.DC, dataset, efficient。Coding agents are a fast-growing LLM application, executing as long-running closed-loop sessions in which LLM generations alternat...

papers.title: Taiji: Pareto Optimal Policy Optimization with Semantics-IDs Trade-off for Industrial LLM-Enhanced Recommendation
papers.summary: Presents Taiji, an industrial LLM-as-Enhancer recommender framework that aligns LLM semantic rewards with collaborative ID preference rewards through Pareto Optimal Policy Optimization. It reports offline and online A/B validation and deployment on Kuaishou advertising traffic.
papers.reason: 近 30 天工业推荐主线：Kuaishou 广告平台、LLM4Rec、Semantic IDs、RL 对齐和线上 A/B 都在一篇里。

papers.title: From Item-Only to Query-Item: Query-Conditioned Generative Search with QGS in Quark
papers.summary: Introduces Query-Conditioned Generative Search for Quark Search, encoding each interaction as a query-item pair and training a query-conditioned next-item objective. It adds Linear HSTU and HFG-Attention to keep long-history modeling and sparse ranking features practical for online search ranking.
papers.reason: 阿里夸克搜索排序的新工业样本：把生成式推荐从 item-only 推到 query-item 条件建模，线上 A/B 有 CTR、Click-Search Ratio 和 PV Duration 提升，适合和 OneReason 一起看 generative ranking 的落地形态。

papers.title: PALS: Power-Aware LLM Serving for Mixture-of-Experts Models
papers.summary: Presents a power-aware runtime for LLM serving that treats GPU power caps as a controllable resource and jointly tunes them with batch size. It integrates with vLLM and evaluates dense and MoE models on multi-GPU systems.
papers.reason: 近 30 天 LLM 推理系统：MoE serving、GPU 功耗控制、vLLM 集成和 QoS 违约率都直接对应 2026 年 AI 基建成本问题。

papers.title: Efficient Memory Management for Large Language Model Serving with PagedAttention
papers.summary: Introduces PagedAttention and vLLM, treating KV cache management like virtual memory so LLM serving can batch more requests with lower memory waste and higher throughput.
papers.reason: LLM 推理两篇经典之一：PagedAttention/vLLM 基本成了现代 serving 系统理解 KV cache、continuous batching 的入口。

papers.title: UxSID: Semantic-Aware User Interests Modeling for Ultra-Long Sequence
papers.summary: Proposes semantic-group shared interest memory for ultra-long user sequence modeling. UxSID uses Semantic IDs and dual-level attention to balance target-aware preference modeling with constant-time online inference, reporting state-of-the-art results and a 0.337% revenue lift in large-scale advertising A/B tests.
papers.reason: 快手广告超长序列建模方向：Semantic ID 不只用于生成式推荐，也能作为 target 语义路由键做共享兴趣 memory；有线上 revenue lift，和 OneReason 的 perception/cognition 主线能互相补。

papers.title: DroidSpeak: KV Cache Sharing Across Fine-tuned Model Variants
papers.summary: Studies KV cache sharing across fine-tuned model variants in multi-LLM serving. DroidSpeak selectively recomputes sensitive layers and reuses the remaining KV cache to cut redundant prefill work.
papers.reason: 2026 NSDI / Microsoft 参与的推理系统：多模型协作、KV cache 共享、fine-tuned variants 和 agentic workflow 都是大厂线上服务会遇到的问题。

papers.title: Tencent Advertising Algorithm Challenge 2025: All-Modality Generative Recommendation
papers.summary: Introduces TencentGR-1M and TencentGR-10M, two de-identified Tencent Ads datasets for all-modality generative recommendation with exposure, click and conversion signals, plus task definitions, baselines and competition findings.
papers.reason: 近 90 天大厂推荐数据集方向：工业广告、生成式推荐、全模态特征、点击和转化目标都很贴近线上系统。
